name: Heart of the Jungle
original_name: ดวงใจเจ้าป่า
overview: In the center of a cave There is an ancient bronze lion statue. The eyes of the statue were lifelike. and is waiting for the real owner to return... Duangjai came to Chiang Mai to attend the event of his dear friend Muk. Kraisorn, Duangjai's grandfather, agreed to allow him.

trailers.title: ดวงใจเจ้าป่า | ละครดี 7HD ปี 2567
